script_text: Second graders learn more sentence skills.
Collective nouns, irregular verbs, and tricky pronouns.
A collective noun names a group as one thing.
Use a singular verb with them. The team runs!
Most past tense verbs add E D. But some are irregular!
Yesterday I ate. I ran. I flew.
Those do not follow the E D rule. Memorize!
Say the sentence out loud. Does it sound right? Your ear often knows!
Now you are ready to use strong sentence skills!
